title: polycnemum arvense var. verrucosum
intro: Polycnemum arvense var. verrucosum, also known as wrinkled spurry, is a plant species in the family Amaranthaceae. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce fever, treat respiratory issues, and alleviate digestive problems. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of Polycnemum arvense var. verrucosum are typically dried and used to make teas, infusions, or decoctions for medicinal purposes.
